violations.description: General employee practices. — --Employee drinks stored above facility drinks in front cooler.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution between uses. -Multiple wet cloths sitting out of sanitizer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean top area of back 2 door prep cooler.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean shelving by toaster ovens and in walk in cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need cleaning throughout kitchen and prep areas.
Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager (Jesse Oconnor) had an expired certificate.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean rust from inside ice machine.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. -Only reached 144F. Do not use until it reaches 160 F on contact of dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floors need more thorough cleaning in kitchen.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
